package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormScopesDefinedInlineRepeatedly() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_scopes_defined_inline_repeatedly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated ad hoc scope functions instead of shared named scopes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
